final:
module johnson_counter_10bit(
    input clk,            // Chip clock signal.
    input reset,          // Synchronous reset signal.
    output [9:0] count    // Counter output signal with a data width of 10 bits.
);

reg [9:0] invalid_count;        // Counter register.

always @(posedge clk)
    if (reset) invalid_count <= 10'b0000000000;           // Reset to zero if reset is active.
    else invalid_count <= {~invalid_count[0], invalid_count[9:1]};    // Johnson invalid_count operation.

assign count = invalid_count;                            // Output invalid_count value.

endmodule
